creator: Skillbred, Margaret
title: Page, ND 1a
transcription: Page, N.D. June 10, 1945 Dear Sam One whole week Imagine It’s a lovely Sunday afternoon The first sunny day in the whole week Page is quiet birds everywhere I’m fine except when I think then I’m lonesome We are going to Fargo early Tuesday and won’t return until Friday or Saturday
LCSH: World War II personal narratives; correspondence

creator: Skillbred, Margaret
title: Page, ND 1b
transcription: Tuesday morning we leave I am on the front steps eating a Hershey Dad is away Mom visiting We went to a cattle sale many cows sold and a prize bull sold for 7500 dollars It was interesting to watch wealthy buyers I have been cleaning the house

creator: Skillbred, Margaret
title: Page, ND 1c
transcription: We mowed lawn and pulled weeds Dad planted potatoes and corn I miss you Please write and tell me about home Love Marg

creator: Halvorson, Selmer
title: Vining, MN 1a
transcription: June 10 1945 I miss you sunset was beautiful We visited family I love you Marge hope you are well

creator: Halvorson, Selmer
title: Vining, MN 1b
transcription: I am milking cows and thinking of you Writing is hard but I try Please write back Love Sam
